choose.when: AND c.CMNT_USE_YN = 'N' AND (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM REPORT R WHERE R.RPT_CMNT_NO = c.CMNT_NO AND R.RPT_STATUS_CD != 'RST004') < 5
AND c.CMNT_USE_YN = 'N' AND (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM REPORT R WHERE R.RPT_CMNT_NO = c.CMNT_NO AND R.RPT_STATUS_CD != 'RST004') >= 5

mapper.select:
SELECT c.CMNT_NO AS cmntNo, c.CMNT_COMM_NO AS cmntCommNo, c.CMNT_MBR_ID AS cmntMbrId, c.CMNT_CONTENT AS cmntContent, DATE_FORMAT(c.CMNT_REG_DATE, '%Y-%m-%d') AS cmntRegDate, c.CMNT_USE_YN AS cmntUseYn, m.MBR_NICKNAME AS mbrNickname, comm.COMM_TITLE AS commTitle FROM `COMMENT` c JOIN MEMBER m ON c.CMNT_MBR_ID = m.MBR_ID JOIN COMMUNITY comm ON c.CMNT_COMM_NO = comm.COMM_NO WHERE 1=1
ORDER BY c.CMNT_NO DESC LIMIT #{offset}, #{size}
SELECT COUNT(*) FROM `COMMENT` c JOIN MEMBER m ON c.CMNT_MBR_ID = m.MBR_ID JOIN COMMUNITY comm ON c.CMNT_COMM_NO = comm.COMM_NO WHERE 1=1

SELECT c.CMNT_NO AS cmntNo, c.CMNT_COMM_NO AS cmntCommNo, c.CMNT_MBR_ID AS cmntMbrId, c.CMNT_CONTENT AS cmntContent, c.CMNT_REG_DATE AS cmntRegDate, c.CMNT_UP_DATE AS cmntUpDate, c.CMNT_USE_YN AS cmntUseYn, m.MBR_NICKNAME AS mbrNickname FROM `COMMENT` c JOIN MEMBER m ON c.CMNT_MBR_ID = m.MBR_ID WHERE c.CMNT_COMM_NO = #{commNo} AND c.CMNT_USE_YN = 'Y' ORDER BY c.CMNT_REG_DATE DESC
SELECT CMNT_NO AS cmntNo, CMNT_COMM_NO AS cmntCommNo, CMNT_MBR_ID AS cmntMbrId, CMNT_CONTENT AS cmntContent FROM `COMMENT` WHERE CMNT_NO = #{cmntNo}
